title: oenothera grandiflora subsp. coronifera
intro: Oenothera grandiflora subsp. coronifera, also known as the evening primrose, is a flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera grandiflora subsp. coronifera include reducing inflammation, improving skin and hair health, and supporting heart health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and oils, which are often used to address various health concerns, including menopausal symptoms and skin conditions.
